hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Remember that strings always need quotation marks

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Loop through each character in the marks string

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: If you encounter a 💥 (major), return false immediately

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Keep count of how many ❌ (minors) you see

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: At the end, check if minors is less than 5
